description: Perform a de-rating analysis for a wind turbine by designing a 3-bladed Horizontal Axis Wind Turbine (HAWT) rotor with a radius of 10.5m using a NACA 4412 airfoil. Generate a 360-degree polar for the airfoil at Re=1,000,000. Using BEM simulations at a wind speed of 10 m/s, determine the specific pitch angle required to limit the mechanical power output to 50 kW (±2 kW). Save the project to /home/ga/Documents/projects/derating_study.wpa, export the simulation results for the successful pitch setting to /home/ga/Documents/projects/target_power_result.txt, and record the final pitch angle in /home/ga/Documents/projects/pitch_setting.txt.
